# bankruptcyfreshstart.org

> Guide to getting a fresh start through bankruptcy -- life after discharge.

bankruptcyfreshstart.org is a free, open-source educational resource about rebuilding after bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/: Guide to fresh start after bankruptcy -- rebuilding credit, financial planning

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
